titleEn: Catalonia probes lab link in swine fever outbreak
titleZh: 加泰罗尼亚调查非洲猪瘟疫情与实验室关联
summaryZh: 西班牙加泰罗尼亚地区政府将调查一家研究机构，因马德里实验室的基因组测序显示，近期爆发的非洲猪瘟病毒株与2007年格鲁吉亚发现的毒株高度相似，该毒株广泛用于研究和疫苗开发。此前官方怀疑病毒通过受污染食物传入，但新证据指向实验室泄漏可能。该事件对欧盟最大猪肉生产国西班牙的贸易造成压力，也凸显生物安全在畜牧防疫中的关键作用。
featuredReason: 该事件揭示了生物安全漏洞对养猪业的巨大威胁，智慧畜牧行业可借此反思如何通过物联网、AI监控等技术加强实验室与养殖场的生物安全防控，避免类似泄漏风险。
contentFull: Disease Notifiable diseases African swine fever Catalonia probes lab link in swine fever outbreak Madrid data suggests virus may have escaped research site 8 December 2025 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Europe The Catalonia regional government said on Friday it would investigate a research centre outside Barcelona after Spain's Agriculture Ministry said a recent swine fever outbreak could have been caused by a laboratory leak, reported Reuters. Spain, the European Union's top pork producer, is trying to reassure trading partners after 13 wild boars tested positive for the virus in hills outside the city. The disease is harmless to humans but can be deadly for pigs and wild boars.Genome sequencing by a Madrid lab showed the strain was “very similar” to one first detected in Georgia in 2007 and now widely used in research and vaccine development, the ministry said. Other cases in Europe belong to a different genetic group."The discovery of a virus similar to the one that circulated in Georgia therefore does not rule out the possibility that its origin may lie in a biological containment facility," the Agriculture Ministry said.Until now, Catalan officials suspected the virus had spread after a wild boar ate contaminated food, possibly a sandwich brought from abroad by a truck driver."The report suggests that it is possible that the origin of the virus is not in animals or animal products from any of the countries where the infection is currently present," the ministry said.It did not name any laboratories in its statement. But Catalonia's top agriculture official, Oscar Ordeig, said the regional government would open an investigation of the state-funded Centre for Research in Animal Health (Cresa).The centre is located next to the Autonomous University of Barcelona and within the six-km (four-mile) confinement area imposed by authorities after the outbreak. Ordeig said other laboratories could also be investigated.The World Organization of Animal Health in 2017 designated Cresa as a research centre into swine fevers.The laboratory did not immediately respond to a request for comment but it told the news verification website Maldita.es it had found no evidence of being the source of the outbreak.The "Georgia 2007" strain of swine fever spread to Armenia, Azerbaijan, Russia and Belarus and reached eastern EU states in 2014, according to the Organisation for Economic Cooperation and Development.It reached China in 2018, causing huge losses. Chinese pig meat production dropped by 27% in 2019. translationZh:
加泰罗尼亚地区政府周五表示，将调查巴塞罗那郊外的一个研究中心。此前西班牙农业部称，近期爆发的猪瘟疫情可能由实验室泄漏引起，路透社报道。

西班牙是欧盟最大的猪肉生产国，在城外山区的13头野猪检测出病毒阳性后，正试图安抚贸易伙伴。该疾病对人类无害，但对猪和野猪可能致命。

马德里一家实验室的基因组测序显示，该毒株与2007年在格鲁吉亚首次发现、现广泛用于研究和疫苗开发的毒株“非常相似”，农业部表示。欧洲的其他病例属于不同的遗传群体。

**“发现与格鲁吉亚流行的病毒相似的病毒，因此不能排除其起源可能来自生物安全设施，”** 农业部表示。

此前，加泰罗尼亚官员怀疑病毒是在野猪吃了受污染的食物（可能是卡车司机从国外带来的三明治）后传播的。

**“报告表明，病毒的可能起源并非来自目前存在感染的任何国家的动物或动物产品，”** 农业部表示。

声明中没有点名任何实验室。但加泰罗尼亚最高农业官员奥斯卡·奥尔德伊格表示，地区政府将对国家资助的动物健康研究中心（Cresa）展开调查。

该中心位于巴塞罗那自治大学旁边，且在疫情爆发后当局划定的6公里（4英里）隔离区内。奥尔德伊格表示，其他实验室也可能被调查。

世界动物卫生组织于2017年指定Cresa为猪瘟研究中心。

该实验室未立即回应置评请求，但告诉新闻验证网站Maldita.es，没有发现自己是疫情源头的证据。

据经济合作与发展组织称，“格鲁吉亚2007”猪瘟毒株传播至亚美尼亚、阿塞拜疆、俄罗斯和白俄罗斯，并于2014年到达欧盟东部国家。

该毒株于2018年到达中国，造成巨大损失。2019年中国猪肉产量下降了27%。
contentHtml:
Catalonia probes lab link in swine fever outbreak 
Madrid data suggests virus may have escaped research site
